context: Tests whether PDFKit guidance treats page indices as exception-sensitive and validates all fixed-index PDFDocument page operations.

checklist.name: Zero-Based Indices
checklist.description: States that PDFDocument page indices are zero-based.

checklist.name: Exception Risk
checklist.description: Explains that page(at:), insert(_:at:), removePage(at:), and exchangePage(at:withPageAt:) must not be called with out-of-range indices because out-of-range calls can raise exceptions.

checklist.name: Navigation Guard
checklist.description: Checks the selected page index is greater than or equal to zero and less than pageCount before calling page(at:).

checklist.name: Remove Guard
checklist.description: Checks the remove index is greater than or equal to zero and less than pageCount before calling removePage(at:).

checklist.name: Insert Guard
checklist.description: Allows insertion only when the target index is greater than or equal to zero and less than or equal to pageCount.

checklist.name: Exchange Guard
checklist.description: Validates both exchange indices are within 0..<pageCount before calling exchangePage(at:withPageAt:).

checklist.name: No Nil Reliance
checklist.description: Does not claim optional binding around page(at:) is sufficient protection for out-of-range page access.

checklist.name: PDFKit Scope
checklist.description: Keeps the answer focused on PDFKit document/page operations rather than routing the core issue to generic UIKit or SwiftUI guidance.
